page_metadata.biotools__summary: Free, open-source platform that provides a growing user community with a suite of tools to construct domain models and knowledge-based applications with ontologies. At its core, Protégé implements a rich set of knowledge-modeling structures and actions that support the creation, visualization, and manipulation of ontologies in various representation formats.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Free, open-source platform that provides a growing user community with a suite of tools to construct domain models and knowledge-based applications with ontologies.
